message:
fix: Improve optional type inference for ternary expressions (Fix 37)

- Add optional type creation in ternary expressions when one branch is None
  and the other is a concrete type (e.g., "value" if cond else None -> ?[]const u8)
- Check anytype_params in None comparisons to use @TypeOf check instead
  of emitting false for "x is None" checks
- Fixes "expected type '[]const u8', found '@TypeOf(null)'" errors in tests
